teachings.teaching: The text emphasizes ancestral succession by listing a generational chain (“X begat Y”), highlighting continuity across generations.
It underscores the importance of family lineage/history as a meaningful foundation for identity and inheritance.
By naming Rahab and Ruth within the lineage, it reflects that unexpected or diverse backgrounds can be part of a rightful genealogical line.

goals.goal: To present (and authenticate) a genealogical record by tracing the succession from one generation to the next, forming part of a larger lineage argument.
